MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2019 IN 206, DEFENDANT OPEN TOP SIGHTSEEING SAN FRANCISCO, LLC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE BASED ON STIPULATION WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES BY VANESSA DENISTON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND SHAHRAD MILANFAR, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE ANY COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY SF LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). HOWEVER, INSTEAD OF THE COURT DENYING THE MOTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND MOVING PARTY HAVING TO REFILE THE MOTION, THE DEFENDANT OPTED TO PAY THE $60 FILING FEE. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/02/19 IS CONTINUED TO 04/27/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL
